ModMetaData.name: Roadbound World
ModMetaData.author: OpenAI for Johnny Berry
ModMetaData.description:
Prototype source package for a RimWorld 1.6 exploration mod that adds edge to edge road travel, road POIs, periodic travelers crossing the map, persistent hostiles across connected tiles, and a Morrowind inspired replacement for the pawn gear and inventory tab with tabs, a paper doll, and a tiled pack grid.
Important: this package is laid out as a proper RimWorld mod project, but the current build environment could not compile the C# assembly. The Source folder is included, but the 1.6/Assemblies folder does not contain a built DLL yet.
